summary: Frontend-only testing of GameBoardPage Roman/cinematic redesign. Game board loads correctly at /game with Roman background (School of Athens) + dark overlay when dark mode enabled. All visual changes verified via screenshot and DOM inspection.

ui_bugs.issue: QuickHostBar has no data-testid='quick-host-bar' and switch turn button has no data-testid='switch-turn-btn' — visible in screenshot but not selectable by testid

action_items: Consider adding data-testid='quick-host-bar' and data-testid='switch-turn-btn' for testability
critical_code_review_comments: GameBoardPage.jsx is 1153 lines - consider splitting into smaller components
QuickHostBar and switch turn button lack data-testid attributes

test_results.roman_background_dark_mode: PASS - backgroundImage includes School of Athens Pexels URL with rgba(6,2,3,0.82) overlay
test_results.category_cards_glassmorphism: PASS - visible in screenshot with backdrop-filter blur, dark semi-transparent cards
test_results.score_buttons_colors: PASS - 300=gold gradient, 600=amber-orange, 900=crimson (verified visually and via computed style)
test_results.game_master_panel_removed: PASS - data-testid gmp-toggle not found, no floating ⚙ button visible
test_results.quick_host_bar: PASS - +300/+600/+900 buttons visible in screenshot on both sides
test_results.team_glow_effects: PASS - Team Alpha (active) shows red border glow, Team Beta shows blue styling
test_results.game_title_gold: PASS - حُجّة title color is rgb(241,225,148) which is the configured gold
test_results.category_card_hover: PASS - CSS .category-card:hover applies translateY(-5px) + golden glow via injected style tag

context_for_next_testing_agent: Game board tested via localStorage injection: set hujjah_dark=true, hujjah_turn=1, hujjah_session JSON before navigating to /game. All Roman/cinematic visual changes verified. Minor: QuickHostBar and switch-turn button lack data-testid attributes.
